---
name: Skill improvement
about: Report outdated guidance or propose a focused improvement to an existing skill
title: "[Skill Improvement]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Affected Skill

Name the skill, for example `sent-skills:waba-template-author`.

## Current Text That's Wrong

Quote or link the current guidance that should change.

## Source of Correction

Link the Meta doc, API changelog, delivery report example, rejection reason, or other evidence.

## Suggested Fix

Describe the smallest change that would make the skill correct.

## Impact

Who is affected, and what bad output or workflow does the current guidance cause?
